=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (38:3-38:21) TS377035: This layer provides FileSystem which is required by another layer in the same Layer.mergeAll call. Layer.mergeAll creates layers in parallel, so dependencies between layers will not be satisfied. Consider moving this layer into a Layer.provideMerge after the Layer.mergeAll. effect(layerMergeAllWithDependencies)
  Fix 0: "Disable layerMergeAllWithDependencies for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable layerMergeAllWithDependencies for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Move layer to Layer.provideMerge"

[D2] (43:3-43:23) TS377035: This layer provides DbConnection which is required by another layer in the same Layer.mergeAll call. Layer.mergeAll creates layers in parallel, so dependencies between layers will not be satisfied. Consider moving this layer into a Layer.provideMerge after the Layer.mergeAll. effect(layerMergeAllWithDependencies)
  Fix 0: "Disable layerMergeAllWithDependencies for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable layerMergeAllWithDependencies for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Move layer to Layer.provideMerge"

[D3] (44:3-44:21) TS377035: This layer provides FileSystem which is required by another layer in the same Layer.mergeAll call. Layer.mergeAll creates layers in parallel, so dependencies between layers will not be satisfied. Consider moving this layer into a Layer.provideMerge after the Layer.mergeAll. effect(layerMergeAllWithDependencies)
  Fix 0: "Disable layerMergeAllWithDependencies for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable layerMergeAllWithDependencies for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Move layer to Layer.provideMerge"

[D4] (45:3-45:16) TS377035: This layer provides Cache which is required by another layer in the same Layer.mergeAll call. Layer.mergeAll creates layers in parallel, so dependencies between layers will not be satisfied. Consider moving this layer into a Layer.provideMerge after the Layer.mergeAll. effect(layerMergeAllWithDependencies)
  Fix 0: "Disable layerMergeAllWithDependencies for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable layerMergeAllWithDependencies for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Move layer to Layer.provideMerge"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable layerMergeAllWithDependencies for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable layerMergeAllWithDependencies for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Move layer to Layer.provideMerge" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMergeAllWithDependencies.ts ---
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

export class DbConnection extends Context.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  make: Effect.succeed({})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
export class FileSystem extends Context.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  make: Effect.succeed({})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
export class Cache extends Context.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  make: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
export class UserRepository extends Context.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  make: Effect.as(Effect.andThen(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}

const cachePassthrough = Layer.effect(Cache, Cache)

export const shouldNotWarn = Layer.mergeAll(
  DbConnection.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
)

export const shouldNotWarn2 = Layer.mergeAll(
  UserRepository.Default,
  cachePassthrough
)

export const shouldWarn = Layer.mergeAll(
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default // <- this requires a DbConnection
).pipe(Layer.provideMerge(FileSystem.Default))

export const shouldWarn2 = Layer.mergeAll(
  DbConnection.Default,
  FileSystem.Default,
  Cache.Default, // <- this requires a FileSystem,
  UserRepository.Default // <- this requires a DbConnection
)


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable layerMergeAllWithDependencies for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable layerMergeAllWithDependencies for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Move layer to Layer.provideMerge" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMergeAllWithDependencies.ts ---
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

export class DbConnection extends Context.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  make: Effect.succeed({})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
export class FileSystem extends Context.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  make: Effect.succeed({})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
export class Cache extends Context.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  make: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
export class UserRepository extends Context.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  make: Effect.as(Effect.andThen(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}

const cachePassthrough = Layer.effect(Cache, Cache)

export const shouldNotWarn = Layer.mergeAll(
  DbConnection.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
)

export const shouldNotWarn2 = Layer.mergeAll(
  UserRepository.Default,
  cachePassthrough
)

export const shouldWarn = Layer.mergeAll(
  DbConnection.Default,
  FileSystem.Default,
  Cache.Default // <- this requires a DbConnection
)

export const shouldWarn2 = Layer.mergeAll(
  FileSystem.Default,
  Cache.Default, // <- this requires a FileSystem,
  UserRepository.Default // <- this requires a DbConnection
).pipe(Layer.provideMerge(DbConnection.Default))


=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable layerMergeAllWithDependencies for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable layerMergeAllWithDependencies for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 2: "Move layer to Layer.provideMerge" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMergeAllWithDependencies.ts ---
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

export class DbConnection extends Context.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  make: Effect.succeed({})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
export class FileSystem extends Context.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  make: Effect.succeed({})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
export class Cache extends Context.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  make: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
export class UserRepository extends Context.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  make: Effect.as(Effect.andThen(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}

const cachePassthrough = Layer.effect(Cache, Cache)

export const shouldNotWarn = Layer.mergeAll(
  DbConnection.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
)

export const shouldNotWarn2 = Layer.mergeAll(
  UserRepository.Default,
  cachePassthrough
)

export const shouldWarn = Layer.mergeAll(
  DbConnection.Default,
  FileSystem.Default,
  Cache.Default // <- this requires a DbConnection
)

export const shouldWarn2 = Layer.mergeAll(
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default, // <- this requires a FileSystem,
  UserRepository.Default // <- this requires a DbConnection
).pipe(Layer.provideMerge(FileSystem.Default))


=== [D4] Fix 0: "Disable layerMergeAllWithDependencies for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 1: "Disable layerMergeAllWithDependencies for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 2: "Move layer to Layer.provideMerge" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMergeAllWithDependencies.ts ---
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

export class DbConnection extends Context.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  make: Effect.succeed({})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
export class FileSystem extends Context.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  make: Effect.succeed({})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
export class Cache extends Context.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  make: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
export class UserRepository extends Context.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  make: Effect.as(Effect.andThen(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}

const cachePassthrough = Layer.effect(Cache, Cache)

export const shouldNotWarn = Layer.mergeAll(
  DbConnection.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
)

export const shouldNotWarn2 = Layer.mergeAll(
  UserRepository.Default,
  cachePassthrough
)

export const shouldWarn = Layer.mergeAll(
  DbConnection.Default,
  FileSystem.Default,
  Cache.Default // <- this requires a DbConnection
)

export const shouldWarn2 = Layer.mergeAll(
  DbConnection.Default,
  FileSystem.Default, // <- this requires a FileSystem,
  UserRepository.Default // <- this requires a DbConnection
).pipe(Layer.provideMerge(Cache.Default))
